query:
SELECT
                a.id,
                a.title,
                a.slug,
                a.short_description,
                a.description,
                a.asset_type,
                a.location_city,
                a.location_country,
                a.total_value_cents,
                a.token_price_cents,
                a.tokens_total,
                a.tokens_available,
                a.annual_yield_bps,
                a.capital_appreciation_bps,
                a.funding_status,
                ARRAY(
                SELECT image_url 
                FROM asset_images 
                WHERE asset_id = a.id 
                ORDER BY is_cover DESC, created_at ASC
            ) AS "image_urls?",
                a.bedrooms,
            a.bathrooms,
            a.building_size_sqm,
            a.lease_type,
                a.term_months,
                a.area,
                a.land_size_sqm,
                (
                    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id)
                    FROM order_items oi
                    JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
                    WHERE oi.asset_id = a.id
                      AND o.status = 'completed'
                ) AS "investor_count?",
                a.video_url,
                a.google_maps_url,
                a.location_description
            FROM assets a
            
            WHERE a.published = true
              AND a.asset_type != 'commodity'
              AND a.id != $1
              AND a.funding_status IN ('funding_open', 'funding_in_progress')
            ORDER BY a.featured DESC, a.created_at DESC
            LIMIT 3
